title: Recombinant expression and purification of FMO enzymes
author: Garcia-Moyano, Antonio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlines the protocol for the expression of recombinant flavin-containing monooxygenase (FMO) enzymes in Escherichia coli strain MC1061 using a pBAD plasmid-based expression system.
steps_raw: This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlines the protocol for the expression of recombinant flavin-containing monooxygenase (FMO) enzymes in Escherichia coli strain MC1061 using a pBAD plasmid-based expression system.
